name: geekhoo-plugins

plugins.name: geeky-orchestration
plugins.description: End-to-end feature delivery: /geeky-plan, /geeky-implement, /geeky-status, portable geeky-coder agent, canonical task template, planning-folder validator, and a PreToolUse guard that warns on edits to frozen planning artifacts.
